title: Database Path
text: Database Path DBMS path to use when storing occurrences of this entity. This is a named route to the Uniface DBMS connector used to connect to the database. Valid values are Uniface default paths ($DEF, $SYS, $UUU), supported databases and file formats, and user-defined paths. The default is DEF . Value Representation Description DEF DEFAULT Default path assignment ($DEF) SYS System Path specified by the $SYS path assignment UUU UOBECT Path specified by the $UUU path assignment XML XML XML path assignment UD n UD n User-defined path (UD0–UD9) Code DBMS Database connector Description The actual database and location to be used in storing data are specified in the application's assignment file. Applies to Entity Related Links Paths and Path Assignments A path is a named route to a resource required by the application, such as a database connector and database, a remote server, or a file location.
